# PlayStation Asset Reference

Pandemonium! 1.cue references FILE "Pandemonium! (USA).bin" BINARY, while the local provided file is Pandemonium! 1.bin.

The owned local PS1 disc image is MODE2/2352 and sector 16 contains CD001 PLAYSTATION ISO9660 evidence.

SYSTEM.CNF boots SLUS_002.32 and SLUS_002.32 has a PS-X EXE header.

The PS1 file map contains JESTERS.PKG extent 298 size 56315904, INTRO.STR size 28276736, LOGO.STR size 3471360, OUTRO.STR size 30898176, DUMMY.STR size 3471360, and FMV.EXE size 135168.

PS1 JESTERS.PKG u32le header begins 16384,176832,0,3288,3288,44,3332,20.

PC JESTERS.PKG is smaller at 50884608 and uses a different u32le header prefix.
